issues.description: Order detail is queried by URL order_id_path without checking current user ownership.
issues.impact: Attackers can read other users' order data.

issues.description: Phone, id_card, passport_no and payment_card are stored as plaintext.
issues.impact: Database leak directly exposes user identity and payment details.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: id_card = encrypt_field(id_card); phone = encrypt_field(phone); bank_account = mask_value(bank_account)

issues.description: Serializer uses fields='__all__' and exposes all user/order fields to API.
issues.impact: Sensitive attributes are returned even when not required by business need.

issues.description: Order model stores passport_no, which is unrelated to normal order processing.
issues.impact: Unnecessary data collection increases compliance and breach risk.

issues.description: No explicit consent record or verification before processing personal data.
issues.impact: Personal data processing lacks legal basis traceability.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: if not consent: return JsonResponse({'error':'consent required'}, status=400); consent_at = timezone.now()

issues.description: card_number, cvv, expiry_date and api_token are stored in plaintext in database.
issues.impact: Database leakage reveals payment credentials directly.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: id_card = encrypt_field(id_card); phone = encrypt_field(phone); bank_account = mask_value(bank_account)

issues.description: Third-party payment gateway secret is hardcoded in source code.
issues.impact: Leaked repository discloses gateway secret and allows unauthorized calls.

issues.description: Card search API builds SQL using string interpolation with untrusted query parameter.
issues.impact: Attackers can manipulate SQL and read arbitrary payment rows.

issues.description: Serializer uses fields='__all__' and returns sensitive card data fields.
issues.impact: Clients receive unnecessary sensitive payment attributes.

issues.description: phone and id_card are stored in plaintext.

issues.description: occupation and medical_history are unnecessary for comment business.
issues.impact: Collecting unnecessary data increases compliance burden.

issues.description: marketing_agree defaults to True without explicit opt-in.
issues.impact: No valid consent trace for marketing data processing.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: if not consent: return JsonResponse({'error':'consent required'}, status=400); consent_at = timezone.now()

issues.description: User list serializer returns all fields including sensitive ones.
issues.impact: API exposes more personal data than required.

issues.description: Stripe API key is hardcoded in view logic and sensitive keys are also fixed in settings.
issues.impact: Leaked source code directly exposes production-like secrets and enables unauthorized third-party payment operations.

issues.description: User phone and bank_account are stored in plaintext without masking or encryption.
issues.impact: Database leakage can disclose financial account and contact data.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: id_card = encrypt_field(id_card); phone = encrypt_field(phone); bank_account = mask_value(bank_account)

issues.description: Admin user listing endpoint lacks any authentication/authorization check.
issues.impact: Any unauthenticated caller can enumerate sensitive user profile data.

issues.description: Transaction API serializer returns all model fields including card_number.
issues.impact: Downstream clients receive unnecessary sensitive data, increasing disclosure risk.

issues.description: Payment log records full card number and amount in plaintext.
issues.impact: Compromised logs expose payment details and can violate compliance requirements.

issues.description: Survey results serializer uses fields='__all__', returning all response fields including IP and sensitive profile linkage.
issues.impact: Result API discloses unnecessary personal and behavioral attributes to clients.

issues.description: phone and id_card are stored in plaintext without encryption or masking.
issues.impact: A database leak directly exposes identity and contact data.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: id_card = encrypt_field(id_card); phone = encrypt_field(phone); bank_account = mask_value(bank_account)

issues.description: System records IP and behavior data during submission without explicit consent evidence.
issues.impact: Personal data processing lacks legal basis traceability.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: if not consent: return JsonResponse({'error':'consent required'}, status=400); consent_at = timezone.now()

issues.description: family_income is collected though not required for questionnaire functionality.
issues.impact: Collecting excessive data increases compliance and breach risk.

issues.description: All historical survey responses are returned with no retention or deletion policy.
issues.impact: Data may be retained indefinitely beyond legitimate business purpose.

issues.description: marketing_agree and data_collection_consent default to True without consent timestamp/content or withdrawal flow.
issues.impact: System cannot prove valid consent or support consent revocation.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: if not consent: return JsonResponse({'error':'consent required'}, status=400); consent_at = timezone.now()

issues.description: id_card, medical_history and allergies are stored directly in plaintext.
issues.impact: Medical and identity data can be directly disclosed if data storage is compromised.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: id_card = encrypt_field(id_card); phone = encrypt_field(phone); bank_account = mask_value(bank_account)

issues.description: emergency_contact_id is collected though not required for basic appointment booking.
issues.impact: Over-collection expands sensitive data scope unnecessarily.

issues.description: Appointment list only checks logged-in state and exposes all patients' appointments to any authenticated user.
issues.impact: Ordinary users can access other patients' medical booking records.

issues.description: Booking endpoint logs complete request body containing sensitive medical history.
issues.impact: Application logs may leak protected health information.

issues.impact: Unnecessary personal data collection raises privacy and compliance risk.

issues.description: Activity API returns all fields including ip_address and full user_agent.
issues.impact: Excessive client visibility of tracking data increases privacy risk.
